stories.title: SGA 30 Pts, NBA-Record 135 Straight 20-Point Games — Thunder Top Knicks 111-100
stories.angle: Record-breaking streak + Thunder closing in on No. 1 seed clinch

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
135 STRAIGHT GAMES with 20+ points.

SGA just set an NBA RECORD that may never be broken.

30 pts. 13/16 FT. 9 straight points in the 4th quarter.

Nobody is stopping OKC. 59-16. #HoopHeroes #ThunderUp

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Down 92-91 in the 4th. Knicks had cut it to 1.

Then SGA scored 9 straight points to put OKC away.

5-for-15 through 3 quarters. Doesn't matter. He SHOWS UP.

That's the record-breaker for you. #HoopHeroes #ThunderUp

article.headline: SGA Extends NBA Record to 135 Consecutive 20-Point Games as Thunder Defeat Knicks 111-100

image_concepts.label: Image 1A
image_concepts.composition: SGA driving to the basket or celebration shot. Semi-transparent dark midnight bar at bottom. Large stat display: "135" in Bebas Neue at top, deep orange. "STRAIGHT GAMES WITH 20+ PTS" in white Montserrat below. Bottom bar: "NBA RECORD" in gold Bebas Neue. Hoop Heroes logo bottom-right.

image_concepts.label: Image 1B
image_concepts.composition: SGA clutch moment or in-game celebration. Text overlay: "SGA TAKES OVER" top-left in deep orange Bebas Neue. Stat bar below: "30 PTS · 13/16 FT" in white Montserrat. Score bug at bottom: "OKC 111 · NYK 100" in white on dark bar.

stories.title: Tatum 32 Pts in Return to Form — First 30-Point Game Since Achilles Return, Celtics Win 114-99

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jayson Tatum just dropped 32 — his first 30-point game since returning from a TORN ACHILLES.

He also became the youngest Celtic to reach 14,000 career points.

This guy is BACK. #HoopHeroes #Celtics

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No Jaylen Brown. No Derrick White.

Tatum 32. Pritchard 28. Celtics WIN 114-99.

Boston is 9-2 with Tatum and just clinched a playoff spot.

The Celtics are DANGEROUS. #HoopHeroes #Celtics

article.headline: Tatum Drops 32 in First 30-Point Game Since Achilles Return — Celtics Clinch Playoff Spot

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
image_concepts.composition: Tatum mid-game action shot — drive or 3-pointer attempt. Text overlay top: "HE'S BACK" in deep orange Bebas Neue, large. Below: "32 PTS · FIRST 30-PT GAME SINCE ACHILLES RETURN" in white Montserrat. Bottom: "#14,000 CAREER POINTS" in gold on dark bar.

image_concepts.label: Image 2B
image_concepts.composition: Pritchard celebratory moment or pull-up jumper. Text: "TATUM 32 · PRITCHARD 28" in gold Bebas Neue. Below: "CELTICS WIN 114-99" in white. Subtext: "PLAYOFF SPOT CLINCHED" in deep orange small caps.

stories.title: Sengun 36/13/7 — Rockets Rout Pelicans 134-102, Houston Tied for No. 5 West
stories.angle: Sengun's dominant run since returning from injury

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Alperen Sengun tonight:
36 PTS · 13 REB · 7 AST · 3 STL · 3 BLK · 0 TO

32 minutes. Zero turnovers.

Rockets rout Pelicans 134-102. Houston tied for No. 5 West. #HoopHeroes #Rockets

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Since returning from injury March 18, Alperen Sengun has averaged:

24.9 PTS / 9.3 REB / 7.1 AST on 62% shooting.

Seven games. The Rockets are quietly DANGEROUS. #HoopHeroes #Rockets

article.headline: Sengun's 36-Point Masterclass Rockets Past Pelicans — Houston Ties for No. 5 West

image_concepts.label: Image 3A
image_concepts.composition: Sengun post move or dunk/finish at the rim. Stat block top-left on dark bar: "36 PTS / 13 REB / 7 AST / 3 STL / 3 BLK" each line in white Montserrat. Title above: "SENGUN" in massive deep orange Bebas Neue. Sub label: "0 TURNOVERS · 32 MINUTES" in gold italic Montserrat.

image_concepts.label: Image 3B
image_concepts.composition: Sengun mid-game action. Text: "SINCE MARCH 18:" in white caps. Large stats on dark bar: "24.9 PPG · 9.3 REB · 7.1 AST" in gold Bebas Neue. Subtext: "62.1% FIELD GOAL %" in deep orange. Bottom: "ROCKETS ON FIRE 🔥" omit emoji, use "ROCKETS SURGING" in white.

stories.title: Nuggets 116, Warriors 93 — Denver's 6th Straight Win Locks GSW Into Play-In
stories.angle: Denver's second-half dominance; Warriors' Play-In reality

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Denver outscored Golden State 70-40 in the second half.

Jokic: 25 pts, 15 reb, 8 ast. Murray: 20 pts.

6th straight Nuggets win. Warriors locked into the Play-In. #HoopHeroes #Nuggets

article.headline: Nuggets Run Past Warriors 116-93 — Denver's Sixth Straight Win, Golden State Locked Into Play-In

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
image_concepts.composition: Jokic triple-double-style celebration or passing moment. Text: "25 PTS · 15 REB · 8 AST" in white on dark bar. Title: "NUGGETS WIN" in deep orange Bebas Neue large. Subtext: "6TH STRAIGHT WIN" in gold.

stories.title: Edwards Upgraded to Questionable — All-NBA Eligibility Hangs in Balance (29.5 PPG)
stories.angle: Potential return + All-NBA games threshold at stake

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Anthony Edwards upgraded to QUESTIONABLE for tonight vs. Dallas.

He's averaging 29.5 PPG but has only played 58 games.

Must play all 8 remaining to qualify for All-NBA.

Tonight matters. #HoopHeroes #Timberwolves

article.headline: Anthony Edwards Upgraded to Questionable — All-NBA Eligibility, Wolves Seeding Both at Stake

image_concepts.label: Image 5A
image_concepts.composition: Edwards in Wolves uniform, game-ready action shot or bench/sideline returning from injury. Text overlay: "ANT IS BACK?" in deep orange Bebas Neue large. Below: "QUESTIONABLE — 29.5 PPG" in white Montserrat. Subtext: "NEEDS 8 GAMES FOR ALL-NBA ELIGIBILITY" in gold small Montserrat.

stories.title: Playoff Picture — Boston Clinches, OKC Leads West by 2.5 Games
stories.angle: Boston clinch as new peg; updated seeds both conferences

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
NBA Playoff Picture — March 30:

West: OKC (59-16) · SA · LAL · DEN
East: DET (53-20) · BOS (clinched) · NY · CLE

Play-In starts April 14. Playoffs April 18.

It's almost time. #HoopHeroes #NBA

image_concepts.label: Image 6A
image_concepts.composition: NBA-arena overhead crowd shot at night game. Dark midnight overlay, text layout as bracket: Left side "WEST: OKC · SA · LAL · DEN · HOU" in white Montserrat. Right side: "EAST: DET · BOS · NY · CLE · ATL" in white. Title: "PLAYOFF PICTURE" in gold Bebas Neue at top.

stories.title: Steph Curry Knee Update — No Return Date, Swelling Continues
stories.angle: GSW locked into Play-In without their franchise star

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Stephen Curry hasn't played since JANUARY.

Runner's knee. Continued swelling. No timeline.

Warriors locked into No. 10 Play-In spot.

If Steph can't go, their postseason run ends before it starts. #HoopHeroes #Warriors

image_concepts.label: Image 7A
image_concepts.composition: Curry off-court / bench / in street clothes or warming up in tunnel. Semi-transparent red-tinted dark overlay. Text: "CURRY UPDATE" in deep orange Bebas Neue. Below: "OUT SINCE JANUARY" in white. Subtext: "SWELLING CONTINUES · NO TIMELINE" in white Montserrat. Bottom: "WARRIORS LOCKED INTO PLAY-IN" in gold.
